name: AgentFinance - SMC Signal to Execution Pipeline

parameters.pythonCode:
# Technical confirmation check
setups = $input.first().json.setups

confirmed = []
for setup in setups:
    # Simplified technical check
    setup.tech_confirmed = True
    setup.tech_score = 0.72
    confirmed.append(setup)

return {"confirmed_setups": confirmed}

# Risk check using RiskManager
# Returns PASS/HOLD/BLOCK status

setups = $input.first().json.confirmed_setups

approved = []
for setup in setups:
    # Simplified risk check
    setup.risk_status = "PASS"
    setup.risk_warnings = []
    approved.append(setup)

return {"approved_setups": approved, "count": len(approved)}

# Execute trade via cTrader
setup = $input.first().json

# In production, call cTrader API
result = {
    "success": True,
    "order_id": "DEMO_" + str(int(time.time())),
    "position_id": setup.id,
    "fill_price": setup.entry,
    "status": "EXECUTED"
}

return result
